name: Agent SF Mortgage Loans & Luxury Real Estate Agents
description_short: Luxury real estate agent specializing in high-end residential properties in San Francisco Bay Area with $1B+ in sales history over 25 years.
description_long:
Joel Goodrich is an established luxury real estate professional operating in the San Francisco Bay Area market for over 25 years. His primary business is residential real estate sales and representation, not mortgage lending, though the company name references both mortgages and real estate services. Goodrich holds California DRE license #01028702 and operates under Coldwell Banker Residential Brokerage, positioning himself as a boutique luxury realtor rather than a mortgage originator or loan servicer.

The company offers luxury residential real estate services including buyer representation, seller representation, property listing, exclusive listing access, neighborhood expertise, and MLS home search capabilities. Current featured properties range from $7.7M to $17.5M, targeting ultra-high-net-worth individuals and institutional buyers. The website includes contact forms for clients interested in selling, buying, renting, or other real estate inquiries, along with a client account portal and property search tools.

Goodrich differentiates through documented transaction history including $1B+ in cumulative sales, celebrity estate sales (Sharon Stone, Kim Kardashian/Kanye West properties), and iconic property listings like the 35,000 sq ft Tobin Clark Estate. Properties he has represented have been featured in Architectural Digest and other design publications, indicating access to high-profile clientele and media visibility within the luxury real estate space.

A critical caveat: This company is a real estate brokerage/agent service, NOT a mortgage lender. The name suggests mortgage services, but the website contains no information about mortgage products, lending rates, loan terms, or mortgage origination. Any consumer seeking actual mortgage financing products would need to contact a mortgage lender separately.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over $1 billion in documented sales history spanning 25 years establishes track record in luxury market segment
California DRE licensed (01028702) and affiliated with established Coldwell Banker Residential Brokerage for regulatory credibility
Represented high-profile celebrity estates including Sharon Stone oceanfront mansion and Kim Kardashian/Kanye West property in Bel Air Crest
Properties featured in prestigious design publications like Architectural Digest enhance credibility and market positioning
Current listings range $7.7M-$17.5M with detailed photography, specifications, and architectural descriptions
Offers multiple service options: buying, selling, renting, and investment property consultation
cons: Company name references 'Mortgage Loans' but website contains zero mortgage products, rates, terms, or lending information—misleading categorization for mortgage shoppers
No information about commission rates, fee structures, or pricing transparency on website
Exclusively serves ultra-luxury market ($7M+); not suitable for first-time buyers, affordable housing, or standard residential transactions
Limited team visibility—website mentions 'Meet The Team' but provides no individual agent bios, experience levels, or staff credentials
best_for: High-net-worth individuals buying or selling luxury residential properties in San Francisco Bay Area ($5M+)
Sellers of celebrity estates or architecturally significant homes requiring boutique marketing and publicity
International investors seeking luxury real estate representation with media connections and institutional credibility
diagnosis: This is a luxury real estate brokerage agency, not a mortgage lender. Consumers seeking mortgage loans, refinancing, or lending products should NOT contact this company—they will only find real estate agent services. Best suited for affluent sellers/buyers of $7M+ San Francisco Bay Area properties who need high-touch luxury brokerage representation.
services: MLS home search and property discovery
Press and media coordination for property marketing
San Francisco Bay Area market coverage
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
